requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline in the Absence of a National Equatorial Guinea BESS Conformity Regime
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——在缺乏赤道几内亚国家BESS合格评定制度情况下IEC 62619作为国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——在缺乏赤道幾內亞國家BESS合格評定制度情況下IEC 62619作為國際基準

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea has no strong national standards body and no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation as of the dataset date. There is no confirmed Equatorial Guinea national standards organisation publishing mandatory technical regulations equivalent to IEC 62619 or a national BESS conformity scheme. This absence of a national conformity regime is a critical and honestly-stated gap: exporters cannot rely on a defined certification pathway and must negotiate project-level technical requirements directly with SEGESA and project owners. In the absence of national mandatory requirements, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and international project developers, financiers, and EPCs operating in Equatorial Guinea are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 63056 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Battery Systems and for their Communication with the User) may also be referenced in project-level specifications for system-level battery integration safety.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚无强大的国家标准机构，亦无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。赤道几内亚无经确认的发布强制性技术法规的国家标准化组织，等同于IEC 62619或国家BESS合格评定计划。这一缺乏国家合格评定制度的情况是一个关键且需如实说明的差距：出口商无法依赖已定义的认证路径，须就项目级技术要求直接与SEGESA和项目业主协商。在缺乏国家强制要求的情况下，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准；在赤道几内亚运营的国际项目开发商、融资方和EPC承包商预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。IEC 63056（电化学储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池——电池系统及其与用户通信要求）在项目级规格中也可能被引用于系统级电池集成安全。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞無強大的國家標準機構，亦無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。赤道幾內亞無經確認的發布強制性技術法規的國家標準化組織，等同於IEC 62619或國家BESS合格評定計畫。這一缺乏國家合格評定制度的情況是一個關鍵且需如實說明的差距：出口商無法依賴已定義的認證路徑，須就項目級技術要求直接與SEGESA和項目業主協商。在缺乏國家強制要求的情況下，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準；在赤道幾內亞運營的國際項目開發商、融資方和EPC承包商預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。IEC 63056（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池——電池系統及其與用戶通訊要求）在項目級規格中也可能被引用於系統級電池集成安全。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; no Equatorial Guinea national mandatory equivalent confirmed)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Battery Systems and for their Communication with the User (may be referenced in project-level specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
Equatorial Guinea — no confirmed national standards body or mandatory BESS product conformity regulation as of dataset date; gap must be confirmed directly with SEGESA and project owner

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage Station) covers BMS safety requirements. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in international project specifications or by international financiers. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance to satisfy international project and financier requirements in Equatorial Guinea.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范）涵盖BMS安全要求。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被国际项目规格或国际融资方接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，以满足赤道几内亚国际项目和融资方要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用電池管理系統技術規範）涵蓋BMS安全要求。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被國際項目規格或國際融資方接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，以滿足赤道幾內亞國際項目和融資方要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage Station)

gap.en: Critical gap: Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed national mandatory BESS product safety or conformity regime — this is a primary and honestly-stated market-access risk, not merely a documentation gap. In the absence of national mandatory requirements, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety, expected by international project developers, financiers, and EPCs operating in the market. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 34131-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in international project technical specifications or by development-finance institutions. Exporters should: (a) confirm directly with SEGESA and the project owner whether any national or project-specific BESS safety conformity requirement exists; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules supplied to Equatorial Guinea BESS projects; (c) assess whether IEC 63056 evidence is required for battery system integration; (d) apply tropical humidity derating per IEC 60721-3 climate class 3K7 or higher in equipment specifications, as Equatorial Guinea's tropical equatorial climate imposes additional derating requirements compared with China temperate manufacturing baselines.
gap.zh: 关键差距：赤道几内亚无经确认的国家强制性BESS产品安全或合格评定制度——这是主要且需如实说明的市场准入风险，而不仅仅是文件差距。在缺乏国家强制要求的情况下，IEC 62619是BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，受在该市场运营的国际项目开发商、融资方和EPC承包商预期。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被国际项目技术规格或开发性金融机构接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接向SEGESA和项目业主确认是否存在任何国家或项目专属BESS安全合规要求；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供赤道几内亚BESS项目所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）评估是否需要电池系统集成的IEC 63056证据；（d）根据IEC 60721-3气候等级3K7或更高等级在设备规格中应用热带湿度降额，因为赤道几内亚的热带赤道气候与中国温带制造基准相比施加额外降额要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：赤道幾內亞無經確認的國家強制性BESS產品安全或合格評定制度——這是主要且需如實說明的市場准入風險，而不僅僅是文件差距。在缺乏國家強制要求的情況下，IEC 62619是BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，受在該市場運營的國際項目開發商、融資方和EPC承包商預期。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被國際項目技術規格或開發性金融機構接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接向SEGESA和項目業主確認是否存在任何國家或項目專屬BESS安全合規要求；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供赤道幾內亞BESS項目所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）評估是否需要電池系統集成的IEC 63056證據；（d）根據IEC 60721-3氣候等級3K7或更高等級在設備規格中應用熱帶濕度降額，因為赤道幾內亞的熱帶赤道氣候與中國溫帶製造基準相比施加額外降額要求。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed national mandatory BESS product safety regulation in Equatorial Guinea as of dataset date; IEC 62619 compliance is expected by international project developers and financiers operating in the market — verify directly with SEGESA and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 34131-2023 are voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed national mandatory BESS product safety or conformity regime as of the dataset date — this absence is a primary market-access risk that must be confirmed directly with SEGESA and the project owner before equipment procurement. IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety; Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 34131-2023 are not accepted substitutes in international project specifications or by development-finance institutions. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test certification from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Apply tropical humidity derating requirements appropriate to Equatorial Guinea's equatorial climate in equipment specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，赤道几内亚无经确认的国家强制性BESS产品安全或合格评定制度——这一缺失是主要市场准入风险，须在设备采购前直接向SEGESA和项目业主确认。IEC 62619是BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准；中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2023不被国际项目规格或开发性金融机构接受为替代依据。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验认证。在设备规格中应用适合赤道几内亚赤道气候的热带湿度降额要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，赤道幾內亞無經確認的國家強制性BESS產品安全或合格評定制度——這一缺失是主要市場准入風險，須在設備採購前直接向SEGESA和項目業主確認。IEC 62619是BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準；中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 34131-2023不被國際項目規格或開發性金融機構接受為替代依據。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗認證。在設備規格中應用適合赤道幾內亞赤道氣候的熱帶濕度降額要求。
